name: custom-mixture-of-priors-v3.1
description: Diverse deterministic prior (v3.1): v3's config (v1 family_weights + min_length 512 to match the 4096 eval context) PLUS length-normalized builders — trend/growth/drift rescaled from absolute slope*t to length-invariant slope*(t/L), so long series stay balanced instead of trend-dominated and the seasonal/AR/regime/chaos structure survives in the corpus. Verified on the real Toto2 backbone at the full 499.5M-token contract budget: v3.1 vs v3 = +1.30% mean over 8 seeds (6/8 positive), on top of v3's confirmed +3.51% over v1. Same length band [512,2048], same throughput (14.8x ref), byte-deterministic, no BLAS ops.
